_meta.resume_note: Negative result audited against Porterville College's complete official 2025-2026 program inventory and the updated inventory in its latest catalog addendum.

notes: No general Economics AA-T, AS-T, AA, or AS appears in the base catalog's complete program inventory or the updated all-program inventory in the third addendum.
